# PrimeHaul OS

> The operating system for UK removal companies. AI-powered survey tool, instant quoting, booking management, marketplace, and business automation -- all in one platform.

## About

PrimeHaul OS is a B2B SaaS platform purpose-built for UK removal companies. Each company gets a white-labelled customer survey tool where their clients upload room photos, and AI vision (GPT-4o) extracts a full furniture inventory with dimensions, weight, and cubic metres. Companies can then review, adjust pricing, approve quotes, accept deposits via Stripe, and manage bookings. The platform also includes a removal marketplace where consumers post jobs and companies bid competitively.

## Key Facts

- B2B SaaS for UK removal companies at GBP 99/month
- 14-day free trial, no credit card required
- White-labelled survey tool with custom branding (logo, colours)
- AI vision inventory extraction from room photos (GPT-4o)
- Built-in Stripe billing and payment processing
- Marketplace with competitive bidding and 15% commission model
- Voice guidance via OpenAI text-to-speech
- ML learning system that improves item recognition over time
- Hosted on Railway, built with FastAPI and PostgreSQL

## Features

### Customer Survey Tool
- White-labelled survey URLs: /s/{company-slug}/{token}
- Interactive Mapbox pickup/drop-off selection
- Property type and access details (floors, lift, parking, steps)
- Room-by-room photo upload with AI inventory extraction
- Item variants and quantity adjustment
- Bulk photo upload option
- Packing services selection
- Instant quote preview with detailed breakdown
- Customer contact capture and submission

### Quote and Booking Management
- Company admin dashboard with job pipeline
- Quote review, price adjustment, and approval workflow
- Quick-approve for fast turnaround
- Terms and conditions upload and digital acceptance
- Deposit collection via Stripe Connect
- Booking confirmation with SMS and email notifications
- Admin notes per job

### Business Tools
- Custom pricing configuration (CBM rates, distance rates, access surcharges)
- Company branding (logo upload, colour scheme)
- Company details management
- Analytics dashboard with conversion metrics
- Email automation with sequences and templates
- Email preference management and unsubscribe handling
- SMTP configuration for custom email sending
- AI credit system for photo analysis
- CBM calculator (free public tool / lead magnet)

### Marketplace
- Public marketplace for consumers to post removal jobs
- Company bidding system with service area matching
- Job broadcasting within radius
- Commission-based revenue model (15%)
- Bid management dashboard for companies

### Platform Administration
- Super admin dashboard with MRR, churn, and trial metrics
- Company verification and partner status
- ML learning management for item recognition
- Activity monitoring and system health
- Social media content generation and publishing
- Sales CRM with lead import, cold email, and follow-up automation

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://primehaul.co.uk/
- Sign up (free trial): https://primehaul.co.uk/auth/signup
- Login: https://primehaul.co.uk/auth/login
- Marketplace: https://primehaul.co.uk/marketplace
- CBM Calculator: https://primehaul.co.uk/tools/cbm-calculator
- Contact: https://primehaul.co.uk/contact
- Terms of service: https://primehaul.co.uk/terms
- Privacy policy: https://primehaul.co.uk/privacy

## Pricing

- GBP 99 per month per company
- 14-day free trial included
- Stripe billing with self-service portal
- AI credits for photo analysis (purchasable top-ups)
- Marketplace commission: 15% on accepted bids
